tasks.completion_summary: Added Emit-BashLine function, updated sources (echo, printf) and heredoc emission, replaced unconditional consumer splitting with defensive split pattern preserving typed objects, fixed 18 pre-existing pipeline bridge test failures
Audited all 12 PS-native passthrough operators. Found 1 actionable mismatch: [[ ]] string comparison operators < > mapped to numeric -lt -gt. Created fix task 8O1qYa4aRzIZ. All 544 tests pass.

Verified paste with process substitution and semicolons already works correctly. Added 4 regression tests covering: paste with process subs, process sub with semicolons, paste with semicolons in process subs, paste as pipe target. All 548 tests pass.
Fixed ExpandBrace infinite loop for non-divisible range steps by replacing post-add equality check with bounded for-loop condition. Added 5 regression tests. All 553 tests pass.
Dead Emit* methods (EmitHead, EmitTail, EmitWc, EmitSort, EmitCut) were already removed in a prior commit. Removed the residual comment documenting their removal. All 553 tests pass.

Added 8 negative parser tests verifying ParseException for malformed bash input (unclosed subshell, missing done/then/do/fi, case missing paren, elif missing fi, multiline subshell). Documented lexer leniency for unclosed quotes and parser infinite loop for cross-construct nested errors. All 561 tests pass.

Added loop iteration cap to emitter: while/until, for-in, and for-arith loops inject $__psbash_iter guard with default 100000 cap configurable via PSBASH_MAX_ITERATIONS env var. Nested loops get unique counter names. while-read (ForEach-Object pipeline) correctly excluded. All 566 tests pass.

Fixed [[ ]] string comparison operators < > to emit lexicographic ordinal comparison via [string]::Compare() instead of PowerShell -lt/-gt. Added extended parameter to TranslateTestCondition. Updated 2 existing tests, added 2 new tests. All 568 tests pass.

Added Action<string>? OutputCallback property to PwshWorker. When set, output lines route to the callback instead of Console.WriteLine. Backwards compatible -- null callback preserves existing Console.WriteLine behavior. Added 3 integration tests. All 571 tests pass.

Changed Command.Simple.HereDoc from HereDoc? to ImmutableArray<HereDoc> HereDocs. Parser collects all heredoc operators and resolves bodies in order. Emitter uses last heredoc for stdin (bash behavior). Updated gap analysis spec. All 573 tests pass.
